item.title: Cooking Like The Old Days
item.description: I found a 63-year old Easy Bake Oven at the flea market, so let try cooking with it.

media:content.media:title: Cooking Like The Old Days
media:content.media:description: I found a 63-year old Easy Bake Oven at the flea market, so let try cooking with it.

item.title: Homer Simpson's Moon Waffles
item.description: A curious look at Homer Simpson’s Moon Waffles, with a playful nod to this food-inspired pop culture treat.

media:content.media:title: Homer Simpson's Moon Waffles
media:content.media:description: A curious look at Homer Simpson’s Moon Waffles, with a playful nod to this food-inspired pop culture treat.

item.title: Unearthing 100-Year-Old Eggs
item.description: A curious look at 100-year-old eggs, exploring their history and what makes them such a fascinating find.

media:content.media:title: Unearthing 100-Year-Old Eggs
media:content.media:description: A curious look at 100-year-old eggs, exploring their history and what makes them such a fascinating find.
